title: fix(deps): update dependency algoliasearch-helper to v2
body:

### [`v2.1.2`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/releases/2.1.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/compare/2.1.1...2.1.2)

-   FIX : [#​113](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/113) support for attributes hightlightPreTag and hightlighPostTag
-   FIX : [#​112](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/112) distinct = undefined sent to the server
-   FIX : [#​110](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/110) helper.hasRefinements() now checks for numerics
-   FIX : [#​106](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/106) convert refinements to string
-   DOC : Update theme + fix (github.com/algolia/minami)
-   DOC : Fix misc links and descrition and added samples of objects
-   DOC : Added a cheat sheet in the generated documentation

### [`v2.1.1`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/releases/2.1.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/compare/2.1.0...2.1.1)

-   FIX : [#​107](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/107) Apply rules to distinct to prevent the API to return an error
-   FIX : make algoliasearch-helper requireable + browserifyable by removing the global envify transform

### [`v2.1.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/releases/2.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/compare/2.0.4...2.1.0)

-   FIX : [#​29](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/29) Avoid callback for outdated queries
-   FIX : [#​64](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/64) Sum up the processing time of all queries
-   FIX : [#​92](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/92) Parameters that can be set in the dashboard shouldn't have defaults
-   FIX : [#​62](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/62) Make sure disctinct is set to false when it's not possible to use distinct in Algolia
-   FEATURE : [#​91](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/91) Support for tags (with support for the raw format [#​98](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/98))
-   FEATURE : [#​70](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/70) Ability to get all refined values : helper.getRefinements( facetname )
-   FEATURE : [#​51](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/51) multiple filters for a single conjunctive facet (tests)
-   FEATURE : Ability to modify any parameter of the state easily ([#​76](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/76) [#​84](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/84) [#​12](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/12))
-   FEATURE : [#​69](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/69) Ability to know if a facet is refined, whatever the value
-   FEATURE : [#​86](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/86) Expose SearchParameters, AlgoliaSearchHelper, SearchResults to users directly in the builds
-   FEATURE : [#​25](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/25) let the user do a clearRefinement with a function as a filter
-   REFACTORING : SearchParameters is immutable ([#​14](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/14))
-   REFACTORING : Ensure SearchParameters is totally frozen ([#​14](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/14))
-   LIB : Update lodash version to 3.9.x
